title: genista cinerea subsp. jimenezii
intro: Genista cinerea subsp. jimenezii, also known as Jimenez's broom or Spanish broom, is a sub-species of shrub in the Fabaceae family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Genista cinerea subsp. jimenezii include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Genista cinerea subsp. jimenezii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
